title: Update README.md and README-jp.md for correctness
summary: Revise README.md and README-jp.md to match current MCP server behavior, .rules guidance, and usage expectations.
acceptance_criteria: README.md reflects current MCP server setup and runtime behavior accurately.
README-jp.md mirrors the English README updates with consistent guidance.
All mismatches identified in p1-t1 are addressed in the documentation updates.

steps.description: Review README.md and README-jp.md against src/ behavior and .rules guidance.
Update configuration examples, prerequisites, and operational notes for accuracy.
Ensure bilingual consistency and resolve any remaining mismatches.

notes: Updated Quick start to use zed-agentops-init.sh and clarified --update behavior (no legacy removal).
Aligned workflow tips: added ops_capture_state and task tracking, removed truncate_limit and optional path wording.
Updated Where things live and tool lists to include observability_summary and remove unsupported tools.
Adjusted MCP tool settings and examples to match current tool registry.
